# Securin

> Securin is a cybersecurity company specializing in continuous attack surface reduction, vulnerability intelligence, and penetration testing. It helps organizations identify, prioritize, and remediate vulnerabilities before attackers can exploit them.

Securin serves enterprise security teams with AI-powered vulnerability management, real-time CVE research, zero-day disclosures, ransomware intelligence, and hands-on penetration testing services. All research and advisories are published openly and indexed for public access.

## Products & Services

- [Attack Surface Management](https://www.securin.io/attack-surface-management): Continuous visibility into known and unknown assets and exposures across your attack surface.
- [Vulnerability Intelligence](https://www.securin.io/vulnerability-intelligence): Timely, contextual, and predictive vulnerability insights powered by AI research.
- [Vulnerability Management](https://www.securin.io/vulnerability-management): Continuous threat analysis and remediation prioritization for enterprise environments.
- [Penetration Testing](https://www.securin.io/penetration-testing): Expert-led offensive security testing to validate defenses before attackers exploit them.
- [Network & Infrastructure Penetration Testing](https://www.securin.io/network-infrastructure-penetration-testing): Targeted pen testing for network infrastructure and internal systems.
- [Network & Application Vulnerability Management](https://www.securin.io/network-application-vulnerability-management): Unified vulnerability management across networks and web applications.
- [AI Research & Development](https://www.securin.io/ai-research-and-development): Securin's AI-driven research into vulnerability prediction and threat intelligence.

## Use Cases

- [Continuous Attack Surface Reduction](https://www.securin.io/continous-attack-surface-reduction): Reduce exposure continuously with automated discovery and risk prioritization.
- [Vulnerability Prioritization](https://www.securin.io/vulnerability-prioritization): Focus remediation effort on the vulnerabilities that matter most using predictive scoring.
- [Ransomware & Exploitable Vulnerability Management](https://www.securin.io/assets-with-known-ransomware-exploitable-vulnerabilities): Identify and manage assets with known ransomware-exploitable vulnerabilities.
- [Meet Compliance Requirements](https://www.securin.io/meet-your-compliance-requirements): Align vulnerability management practices with regulatory and compliance frameworks.

## Security Research & Intelligence

- [Zero-Day Advisories](https://www.securin.io/zero-days): Original zero-day vulnerability disclosures researched and published by Securin.
- [Vulnerability Notices](https://www.securin.io/vulnerability-notices): Detailed CVE-level advisories covering severity, exploitability, and remediation guidance.
- [Articles](https://www.securin.io/articles): In-depth security research articles covering threat actors, CVEs, ransomware, and attack trends.
- [Glossary](https://www.securin.io/glossary): Definitions of cybersecurity terms, vulnerability types, and industry concepts.
- [Search](https://www.securin.io/search): Search across all Securin content — articles, zero-days, CVE advisories, and reports.

## Reports & Downloads

- [Ransomware Report 2025](https://www.securin.io/ransomware-report-2025): Annual analysis of ransomware trends, top CVEs exploited, and threat actor activity.
- [Ransomware Report 2024](https://www.securin.io/ransomware-index-report-2024-download): Mid-year ransomware index covering exploitability and active exploitation data.
- [State of Cybersecurity in America](https://www.securin.io/the-state-of-cybersecurity-in-america): National-level analysis of vulnerability exposure and remediation gaps.
- [CISA Critical Infrastructure Report 2024](https://www.securin.io/cisa-sectors-critical-infrastructure-2024-website): Vulnerability landscape across CISA-designated critical infrastructure sectors.
- [Medical Devices & Healthcare Cybersecurity](https://www.securin.io/2023-state-of-cybersecurity-for-medical-devices-and-healthcare-systems): Research into cybersecurity risks in healthcare systems and connected medical devices.
- [All Reports](https://www.securin.io/reports): Full library of Securin research reports and threat intelligence publications.

## Company

- [About Securin](https://www.securin.io/about-us): Company background, mission, certifications (ISO 27001, SOC 2, OSCP, CREST), and team.
- [Partners](https://www.securin.io/partners): Technology and channel partner ecosystem.
- [Careers](https://www.securin.io/careers): Open roles at Securin.
- [Patents](https://www.securin.io/patents): Securin's intellectual property and patented technologies.
- [Contact](https://www.securin.io/contact-us): Get in touch with the Securin team.
